lesson: Consider two blocks that are resting one on top of the other. The lower block has mass m2 = 6.0 kg and is resting on a frictionless table. The upper block has mass m1 = 3.0 kg. A force of magnitude F is applied horizontally to the lower block as shown. What is the minimum value of the coefficient of static friction mu_s for which the two blocks move together without slipping? Take g = 9.8 m/s^2. Please give your answer as a dimensionless number.
